scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @ataraxia/api" "npm run dev --workspace @ataraxia/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ataraxia/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @ataraxia/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @ataraxia/db
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @ataraxia/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @ataraxia/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @ataraxia/db
scripts.test: npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
